title: Why Does My Glass Sound Like That
description: A simple client side mod that stops the glass sound from breaking your eardrums when you have silk touch
body:
Just about 3 years ago now, Dinnerbone tweeted out that he thinks the glass sound should change when you use a silk touch pick so the audio feedback doesn't make you think, quote, "crap, wrong tool".

Well, that's exactly what this client-side mod fixes. When you break glass with a silk touch pickaxe, you will now be greeted to a new sound that doesn't break your ear drums!

 

Discord: https://discord.gg/gM7KXYXUDM
